__comment: IHEP Power Dashboard — import into Grafana to visualize PowerCollector metrics

dashboard.title: IHEP Power Monitor — Per-Job Energy Attribution

panels.title: Node Power (IPMI vs RAPL)
panels.description: Cross-validation: IPMI whole-node vs RAPL CPU package power

panels.title: Per-VO Energy Stacked
panels.description: Stacked area showing per-VO energy consumption over time. Gap between total and sum = system overhead.

panels.title: Per-Job Power (Watts)
panels.description: Instantaneous power attributed to each job (J/interval = W)

panels.title: Cumulative Energy (kWh) by VO
panels.description: Running total kWh consumed by each VO since collector start

panels.title: CPU Frequency (avg per-core)
panels.description: Average CPU frequency across all cores. Higher freq = more power for same utilization.

panels.title: System Overhead (W)
panels.description: RAPL energy not attributed to any job. Includes idle CPU, uncore, and kernel threads.

panels.title: HS23 per Watt
panels.description: Compute efficiency metric — higher is better

panels.title: CO₂ Equivalent Rate (g/h)
panels.description: Estimated carbon emission rate based on grid carbon intensity

panels.title: PUE-Corrected Power (W)
panels.description: RAPL package power × PUE = estimated total facility power
